name: Security-Focused Code Review
description: AI-powered security code review triggered on pull requests that modify security-sensitive files. Riggs AI analyzes the PR diff for common vulnerability patterns (injection, auth bypass, insecure crypto, SSRF), checks for compliance with secure coding guidelines, and posts a detailed review with findings directly on the PR.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: GitHub
required_integrations.reason: Read PR diffs and post security review comments

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the AppSec team when critical security issues are found in code reviews

data.title: PR Opened on Security-Sensitive Files
data.summary: Triggers when a pull request modifies authentication, authorization, crypto, or input handling code

config.description: Monitors PRs that touch security-sensitive paths (auth/, crypto/, middleware/, input validation, API endpoints)

data.title: AI Security Code Review
data.summary: Riggs AI performs a security-focused review of the PR diff

config.additional_instructions: Review the code diff for security vulnerabilities: check for SQL injection, command injection, XSS, SSRF, path traversal, insecure deserialization, hardcoded secrets, broken authentication, missing authorization checks, insecure cryptographic usage, and race conditions. Assess each finding with severity and provide specific remediation suggestions with code examples.
config.description: AI-powered security code review analyzing PR diffs for vulnerability patterns

data.title: Security Issues Found?
data.summary: Check if the AI review identified any security issues in the code

data.title: Any Critical/High Findings?
data.summary: Check if any findings are critical or high severity requiring PR block

data.title: Request Changes on PR
data.summary: Post a review requesting changes for critical/high security findings

parameters.body:
Security Review — Changes Required

Findings: {{analyze-1.result.findings_count}} ({{analyze-1.result.critical_high_count}} critical/high)

{{analyze-1.result.review_body}}

Please address the critical and high findings before merging.

config.description: Request changes on the PR due to critical/high security findings

data.title: Alert AppSec Team
data.summary: Notify the AppSec team about critical security findings in the PR

data.title: Post Review Comments
data.summary: Post informational review comments for medium/low findings

parameters.body:
Security Review — Advisory Notes

Findings: {{analyze-1.result.findings_count}} (medium/low severity)

{{analyze-1.result.review_body}}

These are advisory — consider addressing them but they do not block merging.

config.description: Post advisory review comments for medium/low severity findings

data.title: Approve PR — Clean Review
data.summary: No security issues found — approve the PR from a security perspective

config.note: Security code review complete. No security issues found in the PR diff.
